import __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=9a7b84b3"; const Fragment = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["Fragment"]; const jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];
import __vite__cjsImport1_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=9a7b84b3"; const useState = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useState"]; const useEffect = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useEffect"]; const useMemo = __vite__cjsImport1_react["useMemo"];
import { useNavigate, useSearchParams } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-router-dom.js?v=9a7b84b3";
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/motion_react.js?v=9a7b84b3";
import { SEO } from "/src/components/SEO.tsx";
import { Filter, Search, Zap, ChevronRight, SlidersHorizontal, Fuel, Settings2 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=9a7b84b3";
import { useLanguageStore } from "/src/store/languageStore.ts";
import { useGarageStore } from "/src/store/garageStore.ts";
import { useSettingsStore } from "/src/store/settingsStore.ts";
import { translations } from "/src/translations.ts";
import { getCarImage } from "/src/utils/carImage.ts";
import { getVal } from "/src/utils/finance.ts";
import { useDebounce } from "/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts";
import { useMarketcheck } from "/src/hooks/useMarketcheck.ts";
import { CompareBar } from "/src/components/CompareBar.tsx";
import { logEvent } from "/src/components/VisitTracker.tsx";
import { fetchWithCache } from "/src/utils/fetchWithCache.ts";
const fmt = (n) => {
  const num = Number(n);
  if (isNaN(num)) return "$0";
  return "$" + Math.round(num).toLocaleString("en-US");
};
export const DealsPage = () => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const { language } = useLanguageStore();
  const { toggleDeal, isSaved, addToCompare, removeFromCompare, isInCompare } = useGarageStore();
  const { settings } = useSettingsStore();
  const t = translations[language].deals;
  const tc = translations[language].calc;
  const initialMake = searchParams.get("make") || "All";
  const initialModel = searchParams.get("model") || "";
  const [deals, setDeals] = useState([]);
  const [photos, setPhotos] = useState([]);
  const [maxPayment, setMaxPayment] = useState(1500);
  const [selectedMake, setSelectedMake] = useState(initialMake);
  const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState(initialModel || "All");
  const { mcInventory, mcTotalCount, isLoading: isMcLoading } = useMarketcheck(useMemo(() => ({
    make: selectedMake,
    model: selectedModel
  }), [selectedMake, selectedModel]));
  const [selectedTrim, setSelectedTrim] = useState("All");
  const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState("All");
  const [displayMode, setDisplayMode] = useState("lease");
  const [isFirstTimeBuyer, setIsFirstTimeBuyer] = useState(false);
  const [hasCosigner, setHasCosigner] = useState(false);
  const [selectedQuickFilter, setSelectedQuickFilter] = useState(null);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(initialModel);
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [selectedTerm, setSelectedTerm] = useState(36);
  const [selectedMileage, setSelectedMileage] = useState("10k");
  const [zipCode, setZipCode] = useState("");
  const debouncedZipCode = useDebounce(zipCode, 500);
  const [selectedBodyStyle, setSelectedBodyStyle] = useState("All");
  const [selectedFuelType, setSelectedFuelType] = useState("All");
  const [selectedDriveType, setSelectedDriveType] = useState("All");
  const [selectedSeats, setSelectedSeats] = useState("All");
  const [tier, setTier] = useState("t1");
  const [downPayment, setDownPayment] = useState(3e3);
  const debouncedDownPayment = useDebounce(downPayment, 500);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState("payment");
  const [quoteSnapshots, setQuoteSnapshots] = useState([]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  useEffect(() => {
    setIsLoading(true);
    const params = new URLSearchParams({
      zipCode: debouncedZipCode || "90210",
      isFirstTimeBuyer: isFirstTimeBuyer.toString(),
      tier,
      term: selectedTerm.toString(),
      down: debouncedDownPayment.toString(),
      mileage: selectedMileage,
      displayMode,
      limit: "50"
      // Limit to 50 deals as requested to improve performance
    });
    Promise.allSettled([
      fetchWithCache(`/api/deals?${params.toString()}`),
      fetchWithCache("/api/car-photos"),
      fetchWithCache(`/api/v2/quotes?zipCode=${debouncedZipCode || "90210"}&uxTier=${tier === "t1" ? "TIER_1_PLUS" : "TIER_1"}&isFirstTimeBuyer=${isFirstTimeBuyer}`)
    ]).then((results) => {
      const data = results[0].status === "fulfilled" ? results[0].value : [];
      const photosData = results[1].status === "fulfilled" ? results[1].value : [];
      const snapshots = results[2].status === "fulfilled" ? results[2].value : [];
      setPhotos(photosData || []);
      setQuoteSnapshots(snapshots || []);
      if (!Array.isArray(data)) {
        console.error("Expected array of deals, got:", data);
        setDeals([]);
        setIsLoading(false);
        return;
      }
      const uniqueDealsMap = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();
      data.forEach((deal) => {
        if (!deal || !deal.make || !deal.model) return;
        const key = `${deal.make}-${deal.model}-${deal.trim || "base"}`;
        if (!uniqueDealsMap.has(key) || deal.type === "lease") {
          uniqueDealsMap.set(key, deal);
        }
      });
      const uniqueDeals = Array.from(uniqueDealsMap.values());
      const snapshotsMap = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();
      if (Array.isArray(snapshots)) {
        snapshots.forEach((s) => {
          if (!s?.vehicle?.make || !s?.vehicle?.model) return;
          const key = `${s.vehicle.make}-${s.vehicle.model}-${s.vehicle.trim || "base"}-${s.quoteType}`;
          snapshotsMap.set(key, s);
        });
      }
      const recalculated = uniqueDeals.map((deal) => {
        const trimKey = deal.trim || "base";
        const leaseKey = `${deal.make}-${deal.model}-${trimKey}-LEASE`;
        const financeKey = `${deal.make}-${deal.model}-${trimKey}-FINANCE`;
        const leaseSnapshot = snapshotsMap.get(leaseKey);
        const financeSnapshot = snapshotsMap.get(financeKey);
        if (leaseSnapshot || financeSnapshot) {
          const snapshot = leaseSnapshot || financeSnapshot;
          return {
            ...deal,
            payment: leaseSnapshot ? leaseSnapshot.monthlyPaymentCents / 100 : deal.payment,
            financePayment: financeSnapshot ? financeSnapshot.monthlyPaymentCents / 100 : deal.financePayment,
            msrp: snapshot?.vehicle?.msrpCents ? snapshot.vehicle.msrpCents / 100 : deal.msrp,
            isFromSnapshot: true
          };
        }
        return {
          ...deal,
          payment: Number(deal.payment) || 0,
          marketAvg: Number(deal.marketAvg) || Math.round((Number(deal.payment) || 0) * 1.267),
          down: Number(deal.down) || 3e3,
          mileage: ["Kia", "Hyundai"].includes(deal.make) ? "10k" : "7.5k"
        };
      });
      setDeals(recalculated);
      setIsLoading(false);
    }).catch((err) => {
      console.error("Critical error in catalog loading:", err);
      setIsLoading(false);
    });
  }, [debouncedZipCode, isFirstTimeBuyer, tier, selectedTerm, debouncedDownPayment, selectedMileage, displayMode]);
  const TARGET_MAKES = ["Acura", "Chevrolet", "Ford", "Genesis", "Hyundai", "Kia", "Lexus", "RAM", "Toyota", "Volvo"];
  const makes = useMemo(() => ["All", ...TARGET_MAKES].sort(), []);
  const availableModels = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedMake === "All") return ["All"];
    const filtered = deals.filter((d) => d.make === selectedMake);
    const mcFiltered = mcInventory.filter((d) => d.make === selectedMake);
    return ["All", ...Array.from(/* @__PURE__ */ new Set([...filtered.map((d) => d.model), ...mcFiltered.map((d) => d.model)]))].sort();
  }, [deals, mcInventory, selectedMake]);
  const availableTrims = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedMake === "All" || selectedModel === "All") return ["All"];
    const filtered = deals.filter((d) => d.make === selectedMake && d.model === selectedModel);
    const mcFiltered = mcInventory.filter((d) => d.make === selectedMake && d.model === selectedModel);
    return ["All", ...Array.from(/* @__PURE__ */ new Set([...filtered.map((d) => d.trim), ...mcFiltered.map((d) => d.trim)]))].sort();
  }, [deals, mcInventory, selectedMake, selectedModel]);
  const classes = useMemo(() => ["All", ...Array.from(new Set(deals.map((d) => d.class)))], [deals]);
  const processedDeals = useMemo(() => {
    const mcDeals = mcInventory.map((item) => {
      const estimatedLease = Math.round((item.price || item.msrp) * 0.0125);
      const estimatedFinance = Math.round((item.price || item.msrp) / 60);
      let image = null;
      if (item.media?.photo_links?.[0]) {
        image = item.media.photo_links[0];
      } else if (Array.isArray(item.media) && item.media[0]) {
        image = typeof item.media[0] === "string" ? item.media[0] : item.media[0].url;
      }
      return {
        id: item.vin,
        // Use VIN as ID for Marketcheck
        vin: item.vin,
        make: item.make,
        model: item.model,
        year: item.year,
        trim: item.trim,
        msrp: item.msrp,
        price: item.price,
        payment: estimatedLease,
        // Estimated lease payment
        financePayment: estimatedFinance,
        // Estimated finance payment
        savings: Math.max(0, (item.msrp || item.price) - item.price),
        image,
        dealer: item.dealer?.name,
        type: "marketcheck",
        status: "active",
        hot: false,
        class: "Other",
        fuelType: item.fuel_type || item.build?.fuel_type,
        bodyStyle: item.body_style || item.build?.body_type,
        driveType: item.drive_type || item.build?.drivetrain,
        transmission: item.transmission || item.build?.transmission,
        engine: item.engine || item.build?.engine,
        miles: item.miles
      };
    });
    const allDeals = [...deals, ...mcDeals];
    return allDeals.map((deal) => {
      const msrp = getVal(deal.msrp);
      let currentPayment = displayMode === "lease" ? deal.payment : deal.financePayment || deal.payment;
      let currentMarketAvg = displayMode === "lease" ? Math.round(currentPayment * 1.267) : Math.round(currentPayment * 1.15);
      const totalCost = currentPayment * selectedTerm;
      const valueScore = totalCost > 0 ? (msrp / totalCost).toFixed(2) : "0";
      return {
        ...deal,
        msrp,
        // Ensure msrp is a number in the processed deal
        displayPayment: isNaN(currentPayment) ? 0 : currentPayment,
        displayMarketAvg: isNaN(currentMarketAvg) ? 0 : currentMarketAvg,
        displayType: displayMode,
        displayTerm: selectedTerm,
        valueScore: parseFloat(valueScore)
      };
    });
  }, [deals, mcInventory, displayMode, selectedTerm]);
  const filteredDeals = useMemo(() => {
    let result = processedDeals.filter((deal) => {
      const finalPayment = Number(deal.displayPayment) || 0;
      const makeStr = deal.make || "";
      const modelStr = deal.model || "";
      const matchesSearch = makeStr.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || modelStr.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
      const matchesPayment = finalPayment <= maxPayment;
      const matchesMake = selectedMake === "All" || deal.make === selectedMake;
      const matchesModel = selectedModel === "All" || deal.model === selectedModel;
      const matchesTrim = selectedTrim === "All" || deal.trim === selectedTrim;
      const matchesClass = selectedClass === "All" || deal.class === selectedClass;
      let matchesFTB = true;
      if (isFirstTimeBuyer) {
        if (hasCosigner) {
          matchesFTB = deal.allowWithCoSigner !== false;
        } else {
          matchesFTB = deal.isFirstTimeBuyerEligible !== false;
        }
      }
      const matchesBody = selectedBodyStyle === "All" || deal.bodyStyle === selectedBodyStyle;
      const matchesFuel = selectedFuelType === "All" || deal.fuelType === selectedFuelType;
      const matchesDrive = selectedDriveType === "All" || deal.driveType === selectedDriveType;
      const matchesSeats = selectedSeats === "All" || (deal.seats || 0) >= parseInt(selectedSeats);
      if (selectedQuickFilter) {
        const dealClass = (deal.class || "").toLowerCase();
        if (selectedQuickFilter === "hybrids" && !(deal.fuelType === "Hybrid" && finalPayment <= 400)) return false;
        if (selectedQuickFilter === "suvs" && !(deal.bodyStyle === "SUV" && finalPayment <= 600)) return false;
        if (selectedQuickFilter === "evs" && !(deal.fuelType === "Electric" && finalPayment <= 600)) return false;
        if (selectedQuickFilter === "luxury" && !(dealClass.includes("luxury") && finalPayment <= 800)) return false;
        if (selectedQuickFilter === "threeRow" && !((deal.seats || 0) >= 7)) return false;
      }
      return matchesSearch && matchesPayment && matchesMake && matchesModel && matchesTrim && matchesClass && matchesFTB && matchesBody && matchesFuel && matchesDrive && matchesSeats;
    });
    return result.sort((a, b) => {
      if (sortBy === "payment") return a.displayPayment - b.displayPayment;
      if (sortBy === "savings") return b.savings - a.savings;
      if (sortBy === "value") return b.valueScore - a.valueScore;
      return 0;
    });
  }, [processedDeals, searchQuery, maxPayment, selectedMake, selectedModel, selectedTrim, selectedClass, isFirstTimeBuyer, hasCosigner, selectedQuickFilter, selectedBodyStyle, selectedFuelType, selectedDriveType, selectedSeats, sortBy]);
  const displayedDeals = useMemo(() => filteredDeals.slice(0, 55), [filteredDeals]);
  useEffect(() => {
    console.log("DealsPage Debug:", {
      localDeals: deals.length,
      mcInventory: mcInventory.length,
      processed: processedDeals.length,
      filtered: filteredDeals.length,
      displayed: displayedDeals.length,
      mcTotalCount
    });
  }, [deals, mcInventory, processedDeals, filteredDeals, displayedDeals, mcTotalCount]);
  const handleCardClick = (deal) => {
    logEvent("select_item", { item_list_name: "deals_catalog", items: [{ item_id: deal.id, item_name: `${deal.make} ${deal.model}` }] });
    if (deal.type === "marketcheck") {
      const originalListing = mcInventory.find((item) => item.vin === deal.vin);
      navigate(`/deal/mc/${deal.vin}`, { state: { isFirstTimeBuyer, hasCosigner, listing: originalListing } });
    } else {
      navigate(`/deal/${deal.id}`, { state: { isFirstTimeBuyer, hasCosigner } });
    }
  };
  const itemListSchema = {
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "ItemList",
    "itemListElement": filteredDeals.slice(0, 10).map((deal, index) => ({
      "@type": "ListItem",
      "position": index + 1,
      "url": `${window.location.origin}${deal.type === "marketcheck" ? "/deal/mc/" + deal.vin : "/deal/" + deal.id}`,
      "name": `${deal.year} ${deal.make} ${deal.model} ${deal.trim}`
    }))
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "min-h-screen bg-[var(--bg)] text-[var(--w)] pt-4 pb-32 font-sans", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
      SEO,
      {
        title: `${selectedMake !== "All" ? selectedMake + " " : ""}${selectedModel !== "All" ? selectedModel + " " : ""}Lease Deals in Los Angeles | Hunter Lease`,
        description: `Browse the best ${selectedMake !== "All" ? selectedMake + " " : ""}car lease and finance deals in Los Angeles. AI-monitored inventory with transparent pricing and zero markup.`,
        schema: itemListSchema
      },
      void 0,
      false,
      {
        fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
        lineNumber: 333,
        columnNumber: 7
      },
      this
    ),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "mb-6 mt-2 flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between gap-4", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("h1", { className: "font-display text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tighter leading-none mb-2", children: t.title }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
          lineNumber: 343,
          columnNumber: 13
        }, this),
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { className: "text-[var(--mu2)] text-sm max-w-2xl", dangerouslySetInnerHTML: { __html: t.subtitle } }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
          lineNumber: 346,
          columnNumber: 13
        }, this)
      ] }, void 0, true, {
        fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
        lineNumber: 342,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this) }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
        lineNumber: 341,
        columnNumber: 9
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-6 items-start", children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("aside", { className: `w-full lg:w-[320px] shrink-0 ${showFilters ? "block" : "hidden lg:block"} lg:sticky lg:top-[calc(var(--nh)+1.5rem)] lg:max-h-[calc(100vh-var(--nh)-3rem)] lg:overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar rounded-2xl bg-[var(--s1)] border border-[var(--b2)] shadow-lg lg:z-10`, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "p-5 space-y-8", children: [
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "space-y-5", children: [
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "border-b border-[var(--b2)] pb-3", children: [
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("h3", { className: "text-xs font-bold text-[var(--w)] uppercase tracking-widest mb-1 flex items-center gap-2", children: [
                /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Settings2, { size: 14, className: "text-[var(--lime)]" }, void 0, false, {
                  fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                  lineNumber: 359,
                  columnNumber: 21
                }, this),
                t.dealAssumptions
              ] }, void 0, true, {
                fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                lineNumber: 358,
                columnNumber: 19
              }, this),
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { className: "text-[10px] text-[var(--mu2)] leading-relaxed", children: "Payments update in real time based on your assumptions." }, void 0, false, {
                fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                lineNumber: 362,
                columnNumber: 19
              }, this)
            ] }, void 0, true, {
              fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
              lineNumber: 357,
              columnNumber: 17
            }, this),
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "bg-[var(--s2)] p-1 rounded-xl flex border border-[var(--b2)]", children: ["lease", "finance"].map((type) => /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
              "button",
              {
                onClick: () => setDisplayMode(type),
                className: `flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${displayMode === type ? "bg-[var(--w)] text-white shadow-sm" : "text-[var(--mu2)] hover:text-[var(--w)]"}`,
                children: type === "lease" ? t.lease : t.finance
              },
              type,
              false,
              {
                fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                lineNumber: 368,
                columnNumber: 21
              },
              this
            )) }, void 0, false, {
              fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
              lineNumber: 366,
              columnNumber: 17
            }, this),
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "space-y-2", children: [
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("label", { className: "text-[10px] font-bold text-[var(--mu)] uppercase tracking-widest", children: t.creditScore }, void 0, false, {
                fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                lineNumber: 380,
                columnNumber: 19
              }, this),
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
                "select",
                {
                  value: tier,
                  onChange: (e) => setTier(e.target.value),
                  className: "w-full bg-[var(--s2)] border border-[var(--b2)] rounded-xl py-2.5 px-3 text-sm font-bold text-[var(--w)] outline-none focus:border-[var(--lime)] transition-all appearance-none cursor-pointer",
                  children: [
                    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("option", { value: "t1", children: t.tier1 }, void 0, false, {
                      fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                      lineNumber: 386,
                      columnNumber: 21
                    }, this),
                    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("option", { value: "t2", children: t.tier2 }, void 0, false, {
                      fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                      lineNumber: 387,
                      columnNumber: 21
                    }, this),
                    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("option", { value: "t3", children: t.tier3 }, void 0, false, {
                      fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                      lineNumber: 388,
                      columnNumber: 21
                    }, this),
                    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("option", { value: "t4", children: t.tier4 }, void 0, false, {

                      lineNumber: 389,
                      columnNumber: 21
                    }, this),
                    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("option", { value: "t5", children: t.tier5 }, void 0, false, {

                      lineNumber: 391,
                      columnNumber: 21

                  ]
                },
                void 0,

                {
                  fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                  lineNumber: 381,
                  columnNumber: 19
                },
                this
              )
            ] }, void 0, true, {
              fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
              lineNumber: 379,
              columnNumber: 17
            }, this),
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "space-y-2", children: [
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex justify-between items-center", children: [
                /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("label", { className: "text-[10px] font-bold text-[var(--mu)] uppercase tracking-widest", children: [
                  t.dueAtSigning,
                  " / ",
                  t.downPayment
                ] }, void 0, true, {
                  fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                  lineNumber: 398,
                  columnNumber: 21
                }, this),
                /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: "text-[var(--lime)] font-mono font-bold", children: fmt(downPayment) }, void 0, false, {
                  fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                  lineNumber: 399,
                  columnNumber: 21
                }, this)
              ] }, void 0, true, {
                fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                lineNumber: 397,
                columnNumber: 19
              }, this),
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
                "input",
                {
                  type: "range",
                  min: "0",
                  max: "10000",
                  step: "500",
                  value: downPayment,
                  onChange: (e) => setDownPayment(parseInt(e.target.value)),
                  className: "w-full accent-[var(--lime)] h-1.5 bg-[var(--s2)] rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer"
                },
                void 0,
                false,
                {
                  fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                  lineNumber: 401,
                  columnNumber: 19
                },
                this
              )
            ] }, void 0, true, {
              fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
              lineNumber: 396,
              columnNumber: 17
            }, this),
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "space-y-2", children: [
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("label", { className: "text-[10px] font-bold text-[var(--mu)] uppercase tracking-widest", children: t.term }, void 0, false, {
                fileName: "/app/applet/src/pages/DealsPage.tsx",
                lineNumber: 411,
                columnNumber: 19
              }, this),
              /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
                "select",
                {

                    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
                      "button",
                      {
                        onClick: (e) => {
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          if (isInCompare(deal.id.toString())) {
                            removeFromCompare(deal.id.toString());
                          } else {
                            addToCompare(deal);
                          }
